zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Berry於1369年出生在英國諾福爾可柏斯頓時，他的父親John Berry27歲，母親Elizabeth Wachesham22歲。他於1420年3月24日與Alice Gerbidge在英國諾福爾可柏斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1433年10月12日在英國賀特福爾凱爾申拉爾享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Berry于1369年出生在英国諾福爾可柏斯頓时，他的父亲John Berry27岁，母亲Elizabeth Wachesham22岁。他于1420年3月24日与Alice Gerbidge在英国諾福爾可柏斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1433年10月12日在英国賀特福爾凱爾申拉爾享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Berry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Béara ‘descendant of Béara’, a personal name of unexplained etymology; or, in some cases, perhaps an Anglicized form of Irish and Manx Ó Beargha. Compare Barry 1.
Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Barrie  .
English: habitational name from any of several places called in Devon named with Old English byrig, dative case of burh ‘fortified manor house, stronghold’, such as Berry Pomeroy and Berrynarbor.

variants.name: Barry
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Aidan, Ciaran, Eoin, John Patrick, Kaitlin, Kieran, Murphy, Aileen, Brigid, Caitlin.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beargha ‘descendant of Beargh’, a byname meaning ‘plunderer’.

Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Báire ‘descendant of Báire’, a short form of either of two Gaelic personal names, Bairrfhionn or Fionnbharr, both meaning ‘fair-topped’. This may also be the source of the Manx name Barry, whose family's main seat was Ballavarry in Kirk Andreas.

variants.name: Bery
meanings: Hungarian (Béry): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Bér, in Baranya, Komárom, Nógrád, Pest, Vas, or Zala counties.

variants.name: Beery
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Béara. See Berry and O'Berry .
Americanized form of Swiss German   Bieri  .

variants.name: Berrie
meanings: (Glasgow): from Middle English or Older Scots (atte) beri ‘(at the) manor house’, see Berry .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Berry was born in 1369, in Paston, Norfolk, England, his father, John Berry, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Wachesham, was 22. He married Alice Gerbidge on 24 March 1420, in Paston, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 12 October 1433, in Kelshall, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Berry est né en 1369, à Paston, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Berry, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Wachesham, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Alice Gerbidge le 24 mars 1420, à Paston, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1433, à Kelshall, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Berry 1369 in Paston, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Berry 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Wachesham 22. Er hat am 24. März 1420 in Paston, Norfolk, England Alice Gerbidge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Oktober 1433 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Kelshall, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Berry è nato il nel 1369 nel Paston, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John Berry, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Wachesham, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Alice Gerbidge il 24 marzo 1420, nel Paston, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 12 ottobre 1433, nel Kelshall, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Norwich, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Berryが1369年にイギリスノーフォルクプアストンで生まれた時，父John Berryは27歳，母Elizabeth Wacheshamは22歳であった。1420年3月24日にイギリスノーフォルクプアストンでAlice Gerbidgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1433年10月12日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアケルシャルで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Berry(이)가 1369년 영국 노르폴크 파스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Berry(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Wachesham(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1420년 3월 24일 영국 노르폴크 파스턴에서 Alice Gerbidge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1433년 10월 12일 영국 허트퍼드실르 켈샤에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Berry nasceu em 1369, em Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Berry, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Wachesham, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Gerbidge em 24 de março de 1420, em Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1433, em Kelshall, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Berry родился в 1369 г. в местности пастон, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Berry было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Wachesham, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Gerbidge 24 марта 1420 г. в местности пастон, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 12 октября 1433 г. в местности келшолл, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Berry nació en 1369, en Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Berry, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Wachesham, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Alice Gerbidge el 24 de marzo de 1420, en Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1433, en Kelshall, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
